title.en: Establish and Maintain Contact Information for Reporting Security Incidents

prose.en: Establish and maintain contact information for parties that need to be informed of security incidents. Contacts may include internal staff, service providers, law enforcement, cyber insurance providers, relevant government agencies, Information Sharing and Analysis Center (ISAC) partners, or other stakeholders. Verify contacts annually to ensure that information is up-to-date.
Contact information is established and maintained for parties that need to be informed of security incidents.
Contacts are verified annually to ensure that information is up to date.

example.en: Contacts may include internal staff, service providers, law enforcement, cyber insurance providers, relevant government agencies, Information Sharing and Analysis Center (ISAC) partners, or other stakeholders.
